common.confirm_delete_transaction: Delete this transaction? The fund balance will be restored.

auth.login_subtitle: Enter your email and password to continue.
auth.name: Name
auth.pw_too_short: New password must be at least 6 characters
auth.pw_same_as_current: New password must differ from current password
auth.change_password_hint: Your old password will stop working immediately.
auth.register_pw_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Account and password
settings.couple_only_note: Concord is couple-only — each instance has exactly 2 accounts (husband + wife).
settings.avatar_invalid_type: Only JPEG, PNG or WebP accepted

finance.title: Finance Settings
finance.subtitle: Annual savings goal and fund opening balances.
finance.yearly_goal_desc: The amount you and your partner want to save together this year. Progress is measured by the total transferred into savings & investment funds — not income/expense of the spending fund.
finance.opening_balance_desc: Money already in each fund when you started using Concord (e.g. bank balance, e-wallets, cash). This is recorded as a structural entry — it does not appear in "Recent Transactions" and is not counted in monthly income/expense reports. Opening balance of savings & investment funds does not count toward the annual savings goal.

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.subtitle: Income and expense history by fund.
transactions.no_transactions_desc: Go to Chat to log transactions in natural language.
transactions.delete_confirm: Delete this transaction? The fund balance will be restored.

goals.title: Savings & Investment Funds
goals.subtitle: Save toward specific goals. Transfer from spending funds to start saving.
goals.no_goals_desc: Create your first fund to start saving.
goals.hint_deadline_optional: Leave blank if no specific deadline
goals.hint_monthly_optional: Leave blank if not needed — only use to track recurring contributions

dates.title: Anniversaries
dates.subtitle: Save your special days.
dates.no_dates_desc: Add special dates to receive reminders.

chat.title: AI Assistant
chat.subtitle: Chat with Concord AI about your family finances.
chat.empty_desc: Start by entering a transaction, e.g. "Bought coffee this morning 45k".

dashboard.title: Hello {name} 👋
dashboard.invite_desc: Once both of you join, the system will create 3 spending funds (Husband / Wife / Joint) to get started.
dashboard.goal_progress_hint: Measured by transfers into savings & investment funds this year
dashboard.no_recent_desc: Go to Chat to log transactions naturally — the agent will assign them to the right fund.

family.invite_subtitle: Send an invite link for your partner to join.
family.setup_subtitle: Create your family to start managing finances together.

invite.title: Invitation to join
invite.login_or_register: Sign in or sign up to continue.
invite.already_in_family: You are already in a family. Leave it first if you want to join another.
